cwt-sadharan-bima-growth-fund.fee: 2.50% down to 1.00% per year (tiered by fund size)
cwt-sadharan-bima-growth-fund.exit: No separate exit load; sale/repurchase spread (~BDT 0.30/unit, capped at 5% of sale price)

cwt-opportunities-fund.fee: 2.50% down to 1.00% per year (tiered by fund size)
cwt-opportunities-fund.exit: No separate exit load; sale/repurchase spread (~BDT 0.30/unit, capped at 5% of sale price)

cwt-community-bank-shariah-fund.fee: 2.50% down to 1.00% per year (tiered by fund size)
cwt-community-bank-shariah-fund.exit: No separate exit load; sale/repurchase spread (~BDT 0.30/unit, capped at 5% of sale price)

cwt-emerging-bangladesh-first-growth-fun.fee: 2.50% down to 1.00% per year (tiered by fund size)
cwt-emerging-bangladesh-first-growth-fun.exit: No separate exit load; sale/repurchase spread (~BDT 0.30/unit, capped at 5% of sale price)

idlc-income-fund.exit: Exit load 2% if held under 90 days, 1.5% for 90 to 180 days, 1% for 180 to 360 days, none after 1 year

shanta-fixed-income-fund.fee: 2.50% down to 1.00% per year (tiered by fund size)
shanta-fixed-income-fund.exit: SIP cancelled before 1 year: 1%; otherwise none
shanta-fixed-income-fund.min: 500 units individual / 5,000 units institution; SIP from BDT 1,000

shanta-amanah-shariah-fund.min: 500 units individual / 5,000 units institution; SIP from BDT 1,000

shanta-first-income-unit-fund.fee: 2.50% down to 1.00% per year (tiered by fund size)
shanta-first-income-unit-fund.exit: SIP cancelled before 2 years: 1%; otherwise none
shanta-first-income-unit-fund.min: 500 units individual / 5,000 units institution; SIP from BDT 1,000

edge-amc-growth-fund.fee: 2.50% down to 1.00% per year (tiered by fund size)
edge-amc-growth-fund.exit: 2% if redeemed within 60 days; or up to 1% if a SIP is cancelled before 2 years; otherwise none

edge-bangladesh-mutual-fund.fee: 2.50% down to 1.00% per year (tiered by fund size)
edge-bangladesh-mutual-fund.exit: 2% if redeemed within 60 days; or up to 1% if a SIP is cancelled before 2 years; otherwise none

edge-high-quality-income-fund.exit: 1% if redeemed within 30 days; or up to 1% if a SIP is cancelled before 2 years; otherwise none

edge-al-amin-shariah-consumer-fund.fee: 2.50% down to 1.00% per year (tiered by fund size)
edge-al-amin-shariah-consumer-fund.exit: 1% if redeemed within 60 days; or up to 1% if a SIP is cancelled before 2 years; otherwise none

ekush-stable-return-fund.fee: 2.50% down to 1.00% per year (tiered by fund size)
ekush-stable-return-fund.exit: SIP cancelled before 3 years: 1%; otherwise none

ucb-income-plus-fund.fee: Not stated; total expenses capped at 4% of NAV
ucb-income-plus-fund.exit: Up to 1% if redeemed within 100 days or over 25% of holding
ucb-income-plus-fund.min: 500 units individual / 5,000 units institution; SIP from BDT 5,000

vipb-accelerated-income-unit-fund.fee: 2.50% down to 1.00% per year (tiered by fund size)
vipb-accelerated-income-unit-fund.exit: Buy/sell spread up to 3% of face value

vipb-growth-fund.fee: 2.50% down to 1.00% per year (tiered by fund size)
vipb-growth-fund.exit: Buy/sell spread 3% (up to 5%) of sale price

vipb-balanced-fund.fee: 2.50% down to 1.00% per year (tiered by fund size)
vipb-balanced-fund.exit: Buy/sell spread 3% (up to 5%) of sale price

vipb-sebl-1st-unit-fund.liquidity: Open-end (converted from a closed-end fund), redeemable weekly at NAV
vipb-sebl-1st-unit-fund.exit: Buy/sell spread up to 1% of NAV

vipb-nli-1st-unit-fund.fee: 2.50% down to 1.00% per year (tiered by fund size)
vipb-nli-1st-unit-fund.exit: Buy/sell spread up to 1% of NAV

idlc-growth-fund.fee: 2.50% down to 1.00% per year (tiered by fund size)

ekush-first-unit-fund.exit: SIP cancelled before 3 years: up to 1%; otherwise none
